parameters.content:
## Get alerts when a PostStack channel or source needs re-authorization

### How it works
Social platform tokens expire quietly - and a dead token means silently missed DMs and failed posts. [PostStack](https://poststack.techskills.academy) - a self-hosted social media automation platform - emits a signed webhook the moment a channel or source trips its health breaker. This workflow verifies the `X-PostStack-Signature` HMAC header, routes `channel.needs_reauth`, `source.needs_reauth` and `source.data_access_expiring` to an attention alert (with the reason and a reconnect link), and `channel.reconnected` to an all-clear - delivered to your chat via a plain incoming webhook.

### Setup
1. In PostStack open **Webhooks → Outbound webhooks**, click **Add endpoint** with this workflow's Production URL (the **PostStack Webhook** node) and copy the signing secret. Outbound webhooks are a PostStack Pro feature.
2. Create an incoming webhook in Slack (or Discord - append `/slack` to its webhook URL) and paste it into **Configuration (EDIT ME)** as `chatWebhookUrl`.
3. Fill in the remaining fields: PostStack URL and the webhook secret.
4. See the red note on **Verify Signature** for one required n8n environment setting.

### Customization tips
Edit the two **Format** Code nodes to mention people or add runbook links. Pair with the post-alerts template - together they cover the full publish-and-health story.

## Receive & Verify
Accepts the PostStack webhook and checks its HMAC signature before trusting the payload.

## Acknowledge & Route
Responds immediately, then splits health problems from the all-clear.

## Format & Send
Problems get an attention alert with a reconnect link; a reconnect gets the all-clear.

## Node setting required
This Code node needs `require('crypto')`. Self-hosted n8n: set `NODE_FUNCTION_ALLOW_BUILTIN=crypto` in the n8n environment, then restart.

nodes.name: PostStack Webhook
nodes.notes: Paste this node's Production URL into PostStack → Webhooks → Outbound webhooks → Add endpoint.

nodes.name: Configuration (EDIT ME)
nodes.notes: webhookSecret is the endpoint's signing secret from PostStack → Webhooks → Outbound webhooks. chatWebhookUrl accepts any incoming-webhook chat URL (Slack shown; Discord: append /slack to its webhook URL).

nodes.name: Respond OK
nodes.notes: Acknowledge before processing - PostStack retries deliveries that don't get a 2xx within 10s.

nodes.name: Route by Event
nodes.notes: The three problem events share one formatter; channel.reconnected gets the all-clear one.

nodes.name: Send Chat Alert
nodes.notes: Slack incoming webhook shown. Works with anything that accepts {"text": ...} - Discord (append /slack to its webhook URL), Mattermost, Rocket.Chat. For Telegram or ntfy swap this node.
